sourceMovie.title: Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City for the same reason it broke through in 2021: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a horror rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Johannes Roberts keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The action and horror blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Resident Evil
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City clicked for you, Resident Evil (2002) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and horror, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City?
faq.answer: Try Resident Evil, Resident Evil: Apocalypse, Resident Evil: Extinction—each shares DNA with Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City?
faq.answer: Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City (2021) is best described as Action, Horror, Science Fiction. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 5.9/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
